title: Video-to-World Inference Pipeline
interaction_flow: create_condition_latent_from_input_frames → torch: pad frames to pixel_chunk_duration length → encode_input_frames
_run_model → inference_utils: get_video_batch(model, prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames)
_run_model → inference_utils: generate_world_from_video(model, state_shape, data_batch, condition_latent, num_input_frames, guidance, num_steps, seed)
generate_world_from_video → torch: pad condition_latent to state_shape[1] if needed

generate_world_from_video → DiffusionV2WModel: model.generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, state_shape, num_steps, is_negative_prompt, seed, condition_latent, num_condition_t, condition_augment_sigma=0.001) → sample latents
key_relationships: DiffusionV2WModel provides encode(), decode(), generate_samples_from_batch() interface

key_methods.DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline.g: Entry point: prompt + image_or_video_path + negative_prompt → (np.ndarray[T,H,W,C], str)
key_methods.DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline._: Orchestrates: tokenizer encoding → model inference → tokenizer decoding with GPU offload support
Calls get_video_batch() + generate_world_from_video() → returns sample latent Tensor
key_methods.inference_utils.read_video_or_image_into: Loads mp4/jpg/png → normalizes to [-1,1] → resizes → returns BCTHW bfloat16 CUDA tensor
key_methods.inference_utils.get_condition_latent: Resolves H,W from state_shape, reads frames, creates padded condition latent
key_methods.inference_utils.create_condition_latent_: Pads input frames to pixel_chunk_duration, calls model.encode(). Supports 'first_and_last_1' condition_location
key_methods.inference_utils.generate_world_from_vide: Pads condition_latent if needed, computes latent frame count, calls model.generate_samples_from_batch(condition_augment_sigma=0.001)
key_methods.inference_utils.get_video_batch: Builds data_batch dict (video zeros, t5 embeddings, image_size, fps, num_frames) + computes state_shape from tokenizer

important_notes: condition_location 'first_and_last_1' is a special mode that encodes first+last frames separately
Frames are normalized to [-1,1] (pixel/128 - 1) as bfloat16 on CUDA
state_shape = [C, T_latent, H//spatial_factor, W//spatial_factor] derived from tokenizer compression factors
VLM prompt upsampler (video2world) uses visual context from video; text2world uses LLM text upsampler
GPU offloading: network, tokenizer, text encoder, prompt upsampler, guardrail can each be offloaded independently
Model name mapping via MODEL_NAME_DICT e.g. 'Cosmos-Predict1-7B-Video2World' → config name
Output shape: np.ndarray uint8 [T, H, W, C] range [0, 255]
